sections.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Object + am/is/are/was/were + V3 (past participle) + by + subject. Rules: In passive voice, the object of an active sentence becomes the subject | Formula (present): am/is/are + V3; Formula (past): was/were + V3 | Use 'by' to mention who performed the action (optional) | Passive is used when the action matters more than who did it
sections.formula: Object + am/is/are/was/were + V3 (past participle) + by + subject

examples.hindi: यह किताब मेरे द्वारा पढ़ी जाती है।
examples.english: This book is read by me.

examples.hindi: यह काम उसके द्वारा किया जाता है।
examples.english: This work is done by him.

examples.hindi: यह letter उसके द्वारा लिखा गया।
examples.english: This letter was written by her.

examples.hindi: खाना माँ के द्वारा बनाया जाता है।
examples.english: The food is cooked by mother.

examples.hindi: यह घर मेरे दादा जी ने बनाया था।
examples.english: This house was built by my grandfather.

examples.hindi: यह गाना उसके द्वारा गाया जाता है।
examples.english: This song is sung by her.

sections.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Object + am/is/are/was/were + V3 (past participle) + by + subject

examples.hindi: यह प्रश्न मेरे द्वारा पूछा गया।
examples.english: This question was asked by me.

examples.hindi: यह फोटो मेरे द्वारा खींची जाती है।
examples.english: This photo is taken by me.

examples.hindi: यह decision team के द्वारा लिया गया।
examples.english: This decision was taken by the team.

examples.hindi: यह पत्र डाकिये द्वारा पहुँचाया जाता है।
examples.english: This letter is delivered by the postman.

examples.hindi: यह गलती उसके द्वारा की गई।
examples.english: This mistake was made by him.

examples.hindi: यह रिपोर्ट मेरे द्वारा तैयार की जाती है।
examples.english: This report is prepared by me.

sections.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Object + am/is/are/was/were + V3 (past participle) + by + subject

examples.hindi: यह किताब लेखक द्वारा लिखी गई थी।
examples.english: This book was written by the author.

examples.hindi: यह project team के द्वारा पूरा किया जाता है।
examples.english: This project is completed by the team.

examples.hindi: यह mistake छात्रों द्वारा की गई।
examples.english: This mistake was made by the students.

examples.hindi: यह awards हर साल दिए जाते हैं।
examples.english: These awards are given every year.

sections.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Object + am/is/are/was/were + V3 (past participle) + by + subject

examples.hindi: यह गाड़ी उसके द्वारा चलाई जाती है।
examples.english: This car is driven by him.

examples.hindi: यह email कल भेजा गया था।
examples.english: This email was sent yesterday.

examples.hindi: यह समस्या हल की गई।
examples.english: This problem was solved.

examples.hindi: यह किताबें बच्चों को दी जाती हैं।
examples.english: These books are given to children.
